$gameId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['title', 'date', 'home', 'away', 'homeScore', 'awayScore']) && newData.child('title').isString() && newData.child('date').isString() && newData.child('home').isString() && newData.child('away').isString() && newData.child('homeScore').isNumber() && newData.child('awayScore').isNumber() && newData.child('homeScore').val() >= 0 && newData.child('awayScore').val() >= 0

votes..write: (auth != null && auth.token.email == 'TROQUE_PELO_SEU_EMAIL_ADMIN') || (root.child('polls').child($pollId).child('active').val() == true && data.isNumber() && newData.isNumber() && newData.val() == data.val() + 1)
